description: Style Note boys will love to get up and about in a pair of shorts from gini and jony that play as hard as they do. Team this with a tee and comfy footwear when you go out next time. The soft cotton fabric will keep him feeling fresh and comfortable all day long, while he enjoys the outing in style. Product Details Cool brown shorts with two insert pockets on the front embellished with contrast thread stitches, two patch pockets on the back, embroidered artwork at the back and an elastic waistband with a push clasp and zipper closure on the front Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cool with like colours using a mild detergent Do not tumble dry, bleach or soak Wash and dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron on print/embroidery
